SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GATTI DELLI F IND/DAB DELLI GATTI HAIR DESIGN

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GATTI DELLI F IND/DAB DELLI GATTI HAIR DESIGN
